‘Tırnak İçinde’ Youtube Channel is Now Online with New Concepts

22.12.2023

The first video of the new broadcast period has been published on our "Tırnak İçinde" Youtube Channel. New programs will be broadcast on the channel every week with different topics and guests.

"Tırnak İçinde" Youtube Channel, one of our university's digital content projects, started to meet the audience with videos in three different concepts.

Three videos per week will be published on the channel. In the first program, Prof. Dr. Halil Berktay talked about a concrete, tangible, understandable understanding of history.

https://www.youtube.com/tirnakicindetv

to subscribe to the “Tırnak İçinde” Youtube Channel and watch and follow the new videos that will be added to watch our programs.
